name: National School Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: No recent news or web presence located; no active website found; the Mundelein/Lake County school-bus market is dominated by Cook-Illinois Corp's Lakeside Transportation, North America Central School Bus and Durham/Summit, with no current public reference to a 'National School Bus Service Inc' at 26526 N Butterfield Rd. Likely inactive, very small, or possibly a record/listing artifact.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm this is an active independent operator. Before any outreach, validate via Illinois SOS corporate filings and IL state pupil-transportation registration; if it is just a residual listing or a 1-2 bus operator it would be sub-scale for a Summit tuck-in.

name: Sundae School Bus
districts_or_customers: likely east-side Cincinnati districts (Forest Hills/Mariemont area, given 3590 Round Bottom Rd, Newtown/Cincinnati 45244)
recent_news: No public web presence, news, or social profile located for 'Sundae School Bus' at 3590 Round Bottom Rd, Cincinnati. The Cincinnati east-side market is largely served by Petermann (National Express/Summit), First Student and district-operated fleets. A 'Sundae Skool Bus' ice-cream truck in Medina OH is unrelated.
fit_notes: Possible small family-run yard manager (Gary Annable) but no independent confirmation it is an operating school-bus contractor. Worth a phone call to (513) Round Bottom area and Ohio SOS check before treating as a real tuck-in; likely too small even if real (37 emp / ~$1.6M).

name: H & M Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: DC/PG County charter customers (churches, groups); no confirmed school-district yellow-bus contracts
recent_news: BBB file opened 2004; A+ rating; D&B/Buzzfile profiles describe it as a Bus Charter Service (NAICS 4854xx is charter, not contract school bus); ~57 years in business per Buzzfile; no M&A activity or news found.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit: classified as charter bus (not yellow-bus contract school transportation), sole-owner mom-and-pop with only 3-4 employees and ~$240K revenue per D&B. The original list classification of 'school=1' appears to be a false positive. Skip.

name: Miller Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Arthur CUSD 305 area; likely Arcola/Atwood-Hammond/Lovington/Amish private schools in Douglas/Moultrie County, IL
recent_news: No M&A or sale news located. PPP loan recipient as 'Miller Bus Service, LLC' (SBA records). Long-tenured single-owner operation (~48 years in business). Independent of major roll-ups.
fit_notes: Genuine independent IL school-bus contractor with ~13-bus fleet, founder-led since 1977 (~age-driven succession potential). Small but a credible single-yard tuck-in for Summit in central IL (Champaign-Decatur corridor); strong overlap with Amish-school work could be culturally specialized. Worth a discreet owner contact.

name: Santa Barbara Transportation
owner_or_parent: Student Transportation of America (STA) / Student Transportation Inc; STA is owned by CDPQ (Caisse de depot et placement du Quebec) since 2018 take-private
principals: Paula S. Branch (local manager, Buellton yard)
districts_or_customers: historically Santa Barbara Unified School District (30+ year contract; lost to Zum in 2024)
central/northern Santa Barbara County districts (Santa Maria, Buellton area)
recent_news: NLRB case 32-RC-065506 confirms 'Santa Barbara Transportation Corp. d/b/a Student Transportation of America'. Santa Barbara Unified ended its ~30-year STA contract and awarded a 5-year deal to Zum in Jan 2024 (Noozhawk; PR Newswire). The Buellton yard at 70 Industrial Way is an STA satellite operation.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. This is a wholly-owned operating yard of Student Transportation of America (CDPQ-owned), a direct competitor to Summit. Remove from the prospect list.
